slug.description: Used for internal references (e.g. in team repos lists). Must match the TOML filename (without .toml).

description.description: Optional short description for display in governance (e.g. visualizer). Not synced to GitHub or other hosts; maintainers may edit the repo description on the host as they wish.

url.description: Canonical URL of the repository (e.g. https://github.com/ScottyLabs/governance or https://codeberg.org/org/repo). Used to distinguish GitHub vs Codeberg and other hosts.
